sqlCommand.descr: update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set BusCat = '20' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat in ('21','22','23','24')
update TransX set BusCat = '30' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat in ('31','32','33','34')
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,2) + '10000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL > = '4000000' and GL <= '5999999' and GL like '%99998'
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,3) + '0000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL > = '4000000' and GL <= '5999999' and GL <> '4498000'
update TransX set GL = '5031000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5030000'
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '10' and GL like '6%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period,Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period, Ledger, Co, GL,PC, '' as CC,BusCat,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL < '6000000' and GL <> '4498000' group by KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period, Ledger, Co, GL,  PC, BusCat)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL < '6000000' and GL <> '4498000' and Flex1 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period,Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period, Ledger, Co, Descr as GL,PC, '' as CC,BusCat,0-Amt1 as Amt1, 'pass2' as Flex1 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on GL = ID and BusCat = Field1 where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap5' and GL >= '4000000' and GL < '6000000' and GL <> '4498000' and BusCat = '30')

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period,Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period, Ledger, Co, Descr as GL,PC, '' as CC,BusCat,0-Amt1 as Amt1, 'pass2' as Flex1 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on GL = ID and Field1 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap5' and GL >= '4000000' and GL < '6000000' and GL <> '4498000' and BusCat <> '30')

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period,Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,t.Period, Ledger, t.Co, Descr as GL,DefaultPC as PC,'' as CC,BusCat,0-Amt1 as Amt1, 'pass2' as Flex1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables on ID = 'default' inner join companies c on t.co = c.co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'ElimGLmap5' and( GL >= '6000000' or GL = '4498000'))
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,3) + '9900' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL < '6000000' and GL <> '4498000' and GL <> '2850500' and Co in ('2999','3999')

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period,Ledger, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period, Ledger, Co, GL,PC,CC,BusCat,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass3' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, YearPeriod,Yr,Period, Ledger, Co, GL,  PC, CC, BusCat)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex1,'') <> 'pass3'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set Ledger = 'UG' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, PC, CC, BusCat, Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][mm]',[Yr],[mm],
